brand.title: Brand
brand.description: The SITE the chat is on. ALWAYS pass @variables.brand ('Kwitko Coffee' or 'Bean & Brew') so the cart link goes to the correct storefront (Kwitko=WooCommerce; Bean & Brew=the D2C store). Never omit it.

couponCode.title: Coupon Code
couponCode.description: Optional discount coupon code to apply.

productIdsCsv.title: Product Ids CSV
productIdsCsv.description: Comma-separated Salesforce product ids to add — use primaryProductId/complementaryProductId from build_strategy. If you only have a product NAME, leave this blank and use productNamesCsv.

productNamesCsv.title: Product Names CSV
productNamesCsv.description: EXACT product name(s) the shopper chose, copied verbatim from the catalog. Use whenever you don't have a real Product2 Id; resolved server-side to the correct product for the current brand so the cart never gets the wrong item.

verifiedEmail.title: Verified Email
verifiedEmail.description: Pass @variables.loggedInEmail when you have it (may be blank for guests). Add-to-cart works for guests on BOTH stores, so a blank email is fine — never treat blank as a blocker.
